data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for upgrade/downgrade and prorated transition behavior.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the upgrade/downgrade and prorated transition behavior, but the evidence provided does not include any checks or reads that directly address this requirement. The prior steps focus on various aspects of the booking and resource management processes, but there is no specific evidence related to the behavior of tier transitions or prorated charges. This indicates a lack of necessary evidence to confirm whether the requirement is satisfied or not.
gaps: No evidence of upgrade/downgrade behavior or prorated transition checks.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify upgrade/downgrade and prorated transition behavior.
